programmes.show_description: When a student goes missing, her mother, a former cop, goes in search for her. Starring Nicholas Lea. (2017)

A Candidate for Murder: Dr Sloan investigates the death of a senator's daughter who seemingly died from a drugs overdose. Can he and Amanda discover the truth?
Ships In The Night: When a gallery robbery leads to murder, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson and his old flame Dr Zee Madeiras catch a killer with an eye for the perfect crime? (2020)
Murder By Twos: Jessica investigates the suspicious deaths of two Cabot Cove locals. Are the deaths linked to an arson attack and a spate of burglaries?
Murder Of The Month Club: Jessica investigates the death of an audience member during the recording of an infomercial.
An Egg To Die For: Jessica assists a Russian police officer during a trip to Miami. Can she help him locate a Faberge Egg, stolen from St Petersburg?
The Scent Of Murder: Jessica and Seth travel to South Carolina to visit the doctor's cousin. Will a business deal involving a magnolia tree prove to be a motive for murder?
Death 'N Denial: Jessica travels to Cairo with a colleague from the museum to discuss an Egyptology exhibition in New York. But she is soon looking for a murderer.
Murder In High "C": Jessica becomes heavily involved in the world of Grand Opera during a trip to Gerona, Italy.
Twice Dead: Jessica investigates the murder of a Nobel Prize winning physicist, a man who was already believed to be dead.
Film Flam: Is history repeating itself when the special screening of a 1960's movie is marred by tragedy?
Murder A La Mode: Jessica travels to Paris to promote her new book. Is a fashion designer's murder linked to a tragic 'sweatshop' fire?
The Dream Team: Gossip spreads through Cabot Cove when developers announce plans for a new resort complex in the local area. Meanwhile, Jessica investigates a fatal car accident.
